descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in Centennial Cup semifinal, advance to final.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes, from British Columbia, defeated the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a Centennial Cup Junior A semifinal on Thursday night in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Richmond advanced to the final game with a 2-1 record in the roundrobin portion of the tournament and will face the Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in a sudden-death final on Saturday night.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Whip Lumber Kings in Centennial Cup Semifinal
